scanCompletion.channelDescription: Notifies you when a local scan finishes while the app is not in the foreground.
scanCompletion.title: Scan complete
scanCompletion.bodyWithResults: Checked {{scannedCount}} media items and found {{resultCount}} flagged results.
scanCompletion.bodyEmpty: Checked {{scannedCount}} media items. This batch is fully processed.

androidBackgroundScan.title: Scanning in progress
androidBackgroundScan.bodyWithoutFile: Processed {{progressLabel}}. Scanning continues after leaving the app.
